title: How Cortisol Changes After 40 and Why It Matters for Your Health
tags: cortisol, stress, hormones, adrenal fatigue, sleep, women over 40, magnesium
summary: An in-depth guide to how cortisol rhythm changes after 40 in women, covering why elevated evening cortisol drives belly fat, sleep disruption, muscle loss, and anxiety, and how magnesium, ashwagandha, and lifestyle changes can normalize the stress response.
featured_image_alt: Woman in a calm wellness environment representing stress relief and cortisol balance
